Facile.question: Qual è il verbo 'to be' corretto: 'I ___ a student'?
Scegli l'articolo corretto: '___ apple a day'
Scegli l'articolo corretto: '___ university in London'
Pronome soggetto corretto per 'Maria and Luca'
Pronome oggetto corretto: 'I see ___ (he) every day.'
Completa con there is / there are: '___ a cat on the sofa.'
Completa con there is / there are: '___ two cars outside.'
Terza persona singolare di 'go' al Present Simple

Media.question: Differenza base: Present Simple o Continuous per azioni abituali?
Forma negativa al past: 'They played football.'
Completa: 'This book is ___ than that one.' (interesting)
Quando si usa 'much' e quando 'many'?
Media.answer: much con nomi non numerabili, many con nomi numerabili

Media.question: Differenza tra 'must' e 'have to' (regola generale)
Media.answer: must: obbligo soggettivo/forte; have to: obbligo esterno

Media.question: Completa: 'I ___ get up early tomorrow.' (obbligo esterno)
Pronome relativo corretto per persone: who/which?
Pronome relativo corretto per cose: who/which?
Completa: 'The girl ___ lives next door is nice.'
Completa: 'The car ___ I bought is red.'

Difficile.question: Quando usi Present Perfect invece di Past Simple (regola breve)?
Difficile.answer: quando il tempo non è specificato o ha effetto sul presente

Difficile.question: Completa: 'She has lived here ___ five years.'
First conditional: completa 'If it rains, we ___ at home.'
Second conditional: completa 'If I were rich, I ___ a yacht.'
Forma passiva di 'They built the bridge in 1990.'
Reported question: 'She asked: "Where do you live?"'
Completa con modal perfect: 'You ___ have told me!' (rimprovero)
Differenza tra 'say' e 'tell'
Difficile.answer: say senza oggetto diretto di persona; tell + persona

Difficile.question: Completa: 'By the time I arrived, they ___ (leave).'

Plus.question: Inversione con avverbio negativo: completa 'Never ___ I seen such a view.'
Completa con inversione: 'Not only ___ he late, but he also forgot the files.'
Mixed conditional: completa 'If I had studied medicine, I ___ a doctor now.'
Third conditional: completa 'If you had called, I ___ helped you.'
Causative have/get: trasforma 'Someone repaired my bike.'
Uso corretto di 'wish' per un rimpianto presente
Plus.answer: wish + past simple (es. I wish I knew)

Plus.question: Uso corretto di 'wish' per un rimpianto passato
Plus.answer: wish + past perfect (es. I wish I had studied)

Plus.question: Completa: 'I'd rather you ___ now.'
Subjunctive formale: completa 'It is essential that he ___ on time.'
Discorso riportato avanzato: 'He said: "I will have finished by Friday"'
Plus.answer: He said (that) he would have finished by Friday.

Plus.question: Differenza tra defining e non-defining relative clauses
Plus.answer: defining: info essenziale, niente virgole; non-defining: info extra, con virgole

Plus.question: Riduzione relativa: 'The man who is standing there...' ->
Participle clauses: completa '___ the door, she went out.' (close)
Modal deduction: completa 'He isn't answering. He ___ be sleeping.'
Differenza tra 'used to' e 'be used to'
Plus.answer: used to = abitudine passata; be used to = essere abituato a

Plus.question: Completa: 'I'm used to ___ early.' (get up)
Completa: 'I used to ___ football when I was a kid.'
Nominalisation: verbo 'decide' -> sostantivo
Collocazione corretta: 'make' o 'do' homework?
Error correction: 'If I would know, I would tell you.' -> forma corretta
Plus.answer: If I knew, I would tell you.
